failures.description: The agent failed to apply the user's `available` constraint when planning the catalog search, using `available_only: false` instead of restricting the search to available products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the overall goal, but at the first planning step it set `available_only` to `false` even though the required constraint was already explicit in the user request. This caused the subsequent tool call to search unavailable items too, deviating from the required action sequence. The later answer happened to select an available item, but the incorrect planned/tool-query constraint was never corrected.
